ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-13-2010. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-02-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. JUL-09-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-02-2010 - CASE SETTLED AT CONFERENCE. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 212 ON MAR-01-2011 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-24-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-01-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
